dis_application_view.llm_summary: Jing Li is a CN national applying for Skilled Worker permission sponsored by The Laurels Care Home for Backend Engineer (SOC 2134). The application states salary £54,700 against the SOC going rate £54,700 and start date 2026-07-01. DIS routes the case to manual review because exact_soc_going_rate. The officer should inspect the linked evidence and use the RFI flow where further evidence is needed.
